conflicts.description: Lin's signature scar is repeatedly described under the left rib line, but chapter 16 briefly places the scar under the collarbone during tribunal testimony.
conflicts.canonical_value: Lin has a pale healed scar under the left ribs / left rib line.
conflicts.resolution_note: The left-rib placement is embedded in the opening discovery, Warehouse Nine duplicate-shell recognition, registry markers, and the Pelorus comparison; chapter 16's collarbone phrasing is isolated and easier to correct than the wider causal chain.
